basics.name: Minwei Yao, PhD
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years building and operating cloud production infrastructure on AWS and colocation facilities across Australia and the US, supporting 10+ enterprise clients. Bilingual in Mandarin and English, experienced in microservice architecture, CI/CD automation and troubleshooting large-scale distributed systems.

summary: Architected and operated production infrastructure for 10+ enterprise clients across AWS and colocation facilities in Australia and the United States
Built, deployed and on-call for production environments serving 10+ enterprise clients including a Tier-1 Australian bank, owning each environment end-to-end
Built monitoring, alerting and on-call response workflows to keep distributed services reliable at scale
Designed and operated CI/CD pipelines on Linux to streamline deployment, scaling and rollback of microservices
Integrated third-party services and APIs to extend platform functionality and reduce operational overhead
Collaborated across cross-functional teams (Design, Product, QA) and global stakeholders to deliver high-quality releases
Built backend APIs and microservices in Java/Spring Boot backed by PostgreSQL, deployed via Docker on Linux hosts
Designed and tested new tools and architectures to improve system reliability and processing speed
Created front-end pages and forms in JavaScript/Ember.js, working across the full service lifecycle from inception to operation
Provided technical support and root-cause analysis for clients across multiple regions and timezones
Carried out 3-year industry-academic collaboration project successfully as main contributor
Took responsibility for training 10+ new PhD students
Collaborated with internal and external stakeholders to meet project objectives on schedule
Developed innovative methodologies to address challenges with 20% improvement in efficiency
Delivered research outcomes via 7 conference presentations and 20 academic paper publications
Performed life cycle analysis on water treatment plant

awards: 2019 FEIT PhD Post-Thesis Publication Award (1 of 3 winners)

skillsummary: Architected and operated production infrastructure on AWS and colocation facilities across AU and US regions, supporting 10+ enterprise clients
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines, monitoring and on-call workflows on Linux, improving deployment speed and incident response
Designed backend microservices in Java / Spring Boot with PostgreSQL, containerised with Docker for portable deployment
Engaged in the full service lifecycle - from design and implementation through deployment, operation and capacity planning
Collaborated effectively across timezones in both English and Mandarin, bridging Australian, Chinese and other global teams
